validations.requirement: A secure cloud service offering will use cloud native architecture and design principles to enforce and enhance the Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability of the system.
validations.interpretation: Cloud network architecture enforces least privilege and high availability.

validations.assertion_reason: ❌ No rule defined for this KSI
validations.requirement: A secure cloud service provider will ensure that all system changes are properly documented and configuration baselines are updated accordingly.
validations.interpretation: All changes are tested and tracked via version-controlled redeployments.

validations.requirement: A secure cloud service offering will protect user data, control access, and apply zero trust principles.
validations.interpretation: IAM controls enforce MFA, least privilege, and zero trust design.

validations.requirement: A secure cloud service offering will follow FedRAMP encryption policies, continuously verify information resource integrity, and restrict access to third-party information resources.
validations.interpretation: Service configurations enforce encryption, integrity checks, and patching.

validations.requirement: A secure cloud service offering will use cloud native architecture and design principles to enforce and enhance the Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability of the system.
validations.interpretation: Cloud network architecture enforces least privilege and high availability.

validations.requirement: A secure cloud service offering will protect user data, control access, and apply zero trust principles.
validations.interpretation: IAM controls enforce MFA, least privilege, and zero trust design.

validations.requirement: A secure cloud service provider will continuously educate their employees on cybersecurity measures, testing them regularly to ensure their knowledge is satisfactory.
validations.interpretation: All personnel receive regular, role-based security awareness training.

validations.assertion_reason: ❌ No rule defined for this KSI
validations.requirement: A secure cloud service provider will ensure that all system changes are properly documented and configuration baselines are updated accordingly.
validations.interpretation: All changes are tested and tracked via version-controlled redeployments.

validations.requirement: A secure cloud service offering will monitor, log, and audit all important events, activity, and changes.
validations.interpretation: Centralized logging and vulnerability scanning detect and alert issues.

validations.requirement: A secure cloud service offering will have intentional, organized, universal guidance for how every information resource, including personnel, is secured.
validations.interpretation: Security policies and inventories are maintained and risk-informed.

validations.interpretation: Security policies and inventories are maintained and risk-informed.

validations.requirement: A secure cloud service offering will define, maintain, and test incident response plan(s) and recovery capabilities to ensure minimal service disruption and data loss during incidents and contingencies.
validations.interpretation: Backup jobs and restore testing meet RTO/RPO recovery objectives.
